creator: guyyur@gmail.com
text:
Closing as bug is not reproducible since support for unaligned access in hardware on armv7 was enabled (commit 40cb6df5f3ae8aa0c9839dda49dd5a6357d3c69a from 2016)

A new bug can be opened if there are other hardware architectures supported by FreeBSD that don't have unaligned access support
